candidates.hypothesis: A wider but slightly shallower model may preserve compression quality while staying quantization-friendly.
candidates.shellEnv:
DATA_PATH=./data/datasets/fineweb10B_sp1024 \
TOKENIZER_PATH=./data/tokenizers/fineweb_1024_bpe.model \
VOCAB_SIZE=1024 \
NUM_HEADS=8 \
TIE_EMBEDDINGS=1 \
VAL_LOSS_EVERY=200 \
MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=600 \
RUN_ID=board-5340081a0d53 \
NUM_LAYERS=8 \
MODEL_DIM=640 \
NUM_KV_HEADS=4 \
MLP_MULT=2 \
TIED_EMBED_LR=0.05 \
MATRIX_LR=0.04 \
TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=1024 \
TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=524288

candidates.hypothesis: Shorter sequences and hotter learning rates may let the run see more tokens and reach a better wallclock-constrained optimum.
